parameters.name: Parameter Save
parameters.comment: This parameter is used to save device parameters and recall saved parameters.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.comment: This parameter sets the language of the device. English language is available as standard. When user-defined is selected the 1st language loaded via USB becomes active.

parameters.name: Parameter Return Factory
parameters.comment: Default value assignments embedded in the device are made.

parameters.name: Log Clear
parameters.comment: All fault records in the device are deleted with this parameter.

parameters.name: Motor Time Setting
parameters.comment: Motor running and load running times in the device can be set as desired as a result of the value entered in this parameter. After saving the parameter the parameter value will be reset and the operating hour value will be updated.

parameters.name: Menu Timeout
parameters.comment: When no key is pressed during the time period specified with this parameter the device will automatically exit the menu. In addition after logging in to the menu if you do not log out with the Menu Logout parameter you can log in to the menu without a password within the time period specified here.

parameters.name: Menu Logout
parameters.comment: Allows manual exit from the menu. Thus password entry is required for the next menu entry.

parameters.name: Mains Off Mode Selection
parameters.comment: When the amplifier module is defined in the device it is the selection of whether the network will be active in off mode.

parameters.name: Mains Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains high voltage alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Voltage parameter depending on the Connection Type Parameter.

relation.comment: Nominal Voltage(P33) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives the Mains High Voltage Level.

parameters.name: Mains Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains undervoltage alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Voltage parameter depending on the Connection Type Parameter.

relation.comment: Nominal Voltage(P33) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives the Mains Low Voltage Level.

parameters.name: Mains Overfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which network high frequency alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

relation.comment: Nominal Frequency(P39) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives the Mains High Frequency Level.

parameters.name: Mains Underfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains low frequency alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

relation.comment: Nominal Frequency(P39) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives the Mains Low Frequency Level.

parameters.name: Mains Phase Sequence Control Action
parameters.comment: Phase sequence warning action selection is made.

parameters.name: Mains Connection Type
parameters.comment: This parameter selects the connection type of the network.

parameters.name: Alternator Poles
parameters.comment: Number of alternator poles parameter.

parameters.name: Nominal Voltage
parameters.comment: The nominal phase-notr voltage value at which the generator will operate.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator high voltage alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold value at which a generator high voltage alarm will be given. All phases are evaluated one by one and the maximum value is used. When the output voltage exceeds the entered value a high voltage alarm condition occurs and the action program starts to operate.

relation.comment: Nominal Voltage(P33) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives Generator High Voltage Level.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator low voltage alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold value at which a generator undervoltage alarm will be given. All phases are evaluated one by one and the minimum value is used. When the output voltage goes below the entered value a low voltage alarm condition occurs and the action program starts to operate.

relation.comment: Nominal Voltage(P33) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives Generator Low Voltage Level.

parameters.name: Nominal Frequency
parameters.comment: The nominal frequency value at which the generator will operate.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator high frequency alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the generator high frequency alarm threshold value which takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

relation.comment: Nominal Frequency(P39) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives Generator High Frequency Level.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator low frequency alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the generator low frequency alarm threshold value which takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

relation.comment: Nominal Frequency(P39) value multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives Generator Low Frequency Level.

parameters.name: Generator Connection Type
parameters.comment: Generator connection type selection.

parameters.name: Engine Type
parameters.comment: Generator engine type selection.

parameters.name: Module Function
parameters.comment: AMF-S and MSU-S are firmware selections.

parameters.name: Mode Function
parameters.comment: Device mode selection.

parameters.name: Prestart Action
parameters.comment: When a pre-start function is defined the time at which this function should take action is selected.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Generator Frequency
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the genset frequency exceeds the set value.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Engine Speed
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the generator speed exceeds the set value.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Generator Voltage
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the generator voltage rises above the set value. If the value is set to 60 the function will become inactive.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Charge Alternator Voltage
parameters.comment: When the charging alternator voltage rises above the set value starting is stopped. If the value is set to 6 the function will become inactive.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Oil Pressure
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the oil pressure rises above the set value. If the value is set to 1 the function will become inactive.

parameters.name: Maximum Number of Cranking Attempts
parameters.comment: Maximum number of starting attempts.

parameters.name: Intermittent Horn Output
parameters.comment: The horn function is the choice of continuous or intermittent operation.

parameters.name: Oil Pressure Unit
parameters.comment: Oil pressure unit selection.

parameters.name: Low Oil Pressure Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Low oil pressure is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Low Oil Pressure Alarm Level
parameters.comment: Alarm threshold for the Oil Pressure Analog input.

parameters.name: Oil Pressure Sender Open Circuit Action
parameters.comment: Oil pressure is an open circuit alarm action.

parameters.name: Temperature Unit
parameters.comment: It is the choice of temperature unit.

parameters.name: High Coolant Temperature Alarm Action
parameters.comment: High Coolant is an alarm action.

parameters.name: High Coolant Temperature Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the alarm threshold for the Coolant Temperature Analog input.

parameters.name: Coolant Temperature Sender Open Circuit Action
parameters.comment: Coolant open circuit is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Low Fuel Level Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Low Fuel Level is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Low Fuel Level Alarm Level
parameters.comment: Alarm threshold value for Fuel Level Analog input.

parameters.name: Fuel Level Sender Open Circuit Action
parameters.comment: Fuel Level open circuit is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Fuel Pump Low Limit
parameters.comment: When the fuel level measured by the fuel sender falls below this limit the fuel pump starts.

parameters.name: Fuel Pump High Limit
parameters.comment: The fuel pump stops when the fuel level measured at the fuel sender exceeds this limit.

parameters.name: Coolant Fan Low Limit
parameters.comment: Cooling fan stop temperature limit

parameters.name: Coolant Fan High Limiit
parameters.comment: Cooling fan operating temperature limit

parameters.name: Nominal Battery Voltage
parameters.comment: Nominal battery voltage

parameters.name: Battery Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: High battery voltage is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Battery Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold at which a battery high voltage alarm will be given.

relation.comment: Nominal Battery Voltage(P77) multiplied by this parameter and divided by 100 gives Battery High Voltage Alarm Level.

parameters.name: Battery Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Low battery voltage is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Battery Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold at which a battery low voltage alarm will be given.

relation.comment: Nominal Battery Voltage(P77) multiplied by this parameter value and divided by 100 gives Battery Low Voltage Alarm Level.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: High charging alternator voltage is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold at which a charging alternator high voltage alarm will be issued.

relation.comment: Nominal Battery Voltage(P77) multiplied by this parameter and divided by 100 gives Charge Alternator High Voltage Alarm Level.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Low charging alternator voltage is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold at which a charging alternator undervoltage alarm will be issued.

relation.comment: Nominal Battery Voltage(P77) multiplied by this parameter and divided by 100 gives Charge Alternator Low Voltage Alarm Level.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Oil) Action
parameters.comment: General Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Air) Action
parameters.comment: Oil Filter Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Fuel) Action
parameters.comment: Air Filter Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Common) Action
parameters.comment: Fuel Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Mains Fail Delay
parameters.comment: Mains is the delay time for any fault to be given.

parameters.name: Mains Phase Sequence Failure Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for a mains phase sequence fault.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for a generator high voltage alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for generator low voltage alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for generator high frequency alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for generator low frequency alarm.

parameters.name: Start Delay
parameters.comment: Parameter for how long after a mains fault the device will auto-start.

parameters.name: Mains Return Delay
parameters.comment: This parameter is the mains stabilization time. The timer starts counting when the mains is restored. If there is no mains problem during this time AMF operation mode is finished.

parameters.name: Prestart Time
parameters.comment: This is the time the pre-start output is off before the motor starts.

parameters.name: Maximum Cranking Time
parameters.comment: Maximum time to energize the starter motor.

parameters.name: Cranking Wait Time
parameters.comment: Waiting time between two starting attempts.

parameters.name: Safety On Delay
parameters.comment: The time the controller ignores oil pressure engine speed and other delayed alarms during starting. This parameter is used to allow the engine to reach its rated speed before the protections are activated. When this parameter is set to 0 this function will be inactive.

parameters.name: Choke Timer
parameters.comment: This time controls the release delay of the choke output. The choke output is activated upon starting. It releases when the engine starts or when this time expires (whichever comes first).

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level Oil Pressure Delay
parameters.comment: If the oil pressure level rises during starting the engine must not start immediately. The switch value will be checked with a delay. If the value is set to 0 the function is disabled.

parameters.name: Stop Selenoid Timer
parameters.comment: Selection of the time elapsed during the stop state.

parameters.name: Warm Up Time
parameters.comment: This is the time the engine is idle before it is allowed to take the load. This parameter is used to prevent excessive wear by heating the motor. When this parameter is set to 0 this function will be inactive.

parameters.name: Cooling Time
parameters.comment: This is the no-load cooling time before stopping the generator.

parameters.name: Transfer Time
parameters.comment: The time between the opening of one load switch and the closing of the other. Used during load transfer to and from the genset.

parameters.name: Horn Time
parameters.comment: When an alarm occurs this parameter determines how long the horn output will be active.

parameters.name: Low Oil Pressure Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Alarm delay time for Oil Pressure Analog input.

parameters.name: Oil Pressure Sender Open Circuit Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for oil pressure sender open circuit detection.

parameters.name: High Coolant Temperature Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Coolant Temperature Alarm delay time for analog input.

parameters.name: Coolant Temperature Sender Open Circuit Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the coolant temperature sender open circuit detection.

parameters.name: Low Fuel Level Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the alarm delay time for the Fuel Level Analog input.

parameters.name: Fuel Level Sender Open Circuit Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for fuel level sender open circuit detection.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Oil) Time
parameters.comment: When the engine is running the maintenance time counter starts counting. When it reaches the entered time value the maintenance time warning alarm sounds.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Air) Time
parameters.comment: When the engine is running the maintenance time counter starts counting. When it reaches the entered time value maintenance time warning alarm is given.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Fuel) Time
parameters.comment: When the engine is running the maintenance time counter starts counting. When it reaches the entered time value maintenance time warning alarm is given.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Common) Time
parameters.comment: When the engine is running the maintenance time counter starts counting. When it reaches the entered time value maintenance time warning alarm is given.

parameters.name: Service Time Reset
parameters.comment: Selection of assignment of service times to the entered duration parameters.

parameters.name: J1939 ECU Type
parameters.comment: This parameter selects the ECU type.

parameters.name: ECU Speed Control Enable
parameters.comment: This parameter selects whether the speed information is read via the device or ECU.

parameters.name: ECU Oil Pressure Control Enable
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the oil pressure information is selected to be read via the device or ECU.

parameters.name: ECU Temperature Control Enable
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the temperature information is selected to be read via the device or ECU.

parameters.name: Engine Speed SetPoint
parameters.comment: Engine speed set point selection.

parameters.name: Engine Speed Correction
parameters.comment: Motor speed correction ratio selection.

parameters.name: CAN ECU Communication Fail Action
parameters.comment: CanBUS communication error alarm action.

parameters.name: CAN ECU Droop Enable
parameters.comment: ECU droop selection parameter.

parameters.name: Can Ecu Droop Percent
parameters.comment: If ECU droop selection is active this parameter is ECU droop percentage selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-1 Source
parameters.comment: Output-1 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-1 polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-2 Source
parameters.comment: Output-2 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-2 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-3 Source
parameters.comment: Output-3 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-3 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-3 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-4 Source
parameters.comment: Output-4 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-4 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-4 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-5 Source
parameters.comment: Output-5 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-5 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-5 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-6 Source
parameters.comment: Output-6 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-6 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-6 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Source
parameters.comment: Input-1 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: Input-1 polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Action
parameters.comment: Input-1 if the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Arming
parameters.comment: Input-1 if the input source is set as user configured the fault function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Source
parameters.comment: Input-2 is the parameter for function selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: Input-2 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Action
parameters.comment: If the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Arming
parameters.comment: If the input source is set as configured by the user the error function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Sensor Type
parameters.comment: Analog Input-1 is the parameter for hardware selection.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Sensor Selection
parameters.comment: Analog Input-1 is the parameter for pressure sensor selection if pressure sensor is selected.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Source
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-1 is set as Digital Input it is the parameter where input function selection is made.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-1 is set as Digital Input it is the input polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Action
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-1 is set as Digital Input it is the input alarm action selection parameter.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Arming
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-1 is set as Digital Input it is the parameter where the active time of the input is selected.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Table Len
parameters.comment: It is the table size to be entered by the user for the oil sender.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Sender Resistor-1
parameters.comment: Analog Input-1 (If Sensor Selection is User Defined) Sensor Resistance-1

parameters.name: Analogue Input-2 Sensor Type
parameters.comment: Analog Input-2 is the parameter where hardware selection is made.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-2 Sensor Selection
parameters.comment: Analog Input-2 is the parameter where temperature sensor selection is made if temperature sensor is selected.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-2 Source
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-2 is set as Digital Input it is the parameter where input function selection is made.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-2 is set as Digital Input it is the parameter where input polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-2 Action
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-2 is set as Digital Input it is the input alarm action selection parameter.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-2 Arming
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-2 is set as Digital Input it is the parameter to select the active time of the input.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-2 Table Len
parameters.comment: It is the table size to be entered by the user for the Temperature Sensor.
